plan_metrics.plan_content:
## Plan Summary

**One file to change: `src/pipeline.ts`** — five targeted algorithmic rewrites, no output changes.

### Root Causes & Fixes

| Function | Current complexity | Fix | Target complexity |
|---|---|---|---|
| `groupByCategory` | O(n×g) scan + O(g) reduce per insert | `Map<category, group>` + incremental `+=` | O(n) |
| `findDuplicates` | O(n²) nested loops + O(m) group scan | Single-pass `Map<key, group>`, filter >1 at end | O(n) |
| `calculateRunningBalance` | O(n×m) — rescans ALL txns + re-sorts + re-sums from scratch for every position | Filter once → sort once → accumulate once | O(n + m log m) |
| `topSpenders` | O(n×u) per-user rescan + O(u²) bubble sort | Single-pass `Map` + `Array.sort()` | O(n + u log u) |
| `searchTransactions` | `new RegExp()` inside loop + O(r) linear dedup | Compile once outside loop + `Set<id>` for dedup | O(n) |
| `processAll` | — | No changes needed | — |

**Critical correctness detail for `calculateRunningBalance`:** the running accumulator is kept _unrounded_ between entries; `Math.round(runningSum * 100) / 100` is applied only when pushing each entry — this exactly replicates the original floating-point results.

**Verification:** `npx vitest run` — all 16 correctness tests + all 6 performance benchmarks must pass.
